pr.title: Link multiple files, remove invalid files from configure.py, fix function call
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Linked several previously nonmatching objects by updating configure.py, removed invalid duplicate/incorrect object entries, corrected a wrong item function call in itwstar.c, and adjusted GALE01 symbol names/scopes/sizes to match the newly linked layout. The decomp.dev report showed +29480 bytes linked code, +128 bytes matched data, +592 bytes linked data, and 2 new matches: main/melee/pl/plattack .sbss to 100% and main/melee/ft/ftchangeparam .data to 100%. Evidence is mostly from the title, diff, and bot report; there was no PR body or human review discussion.

key_files.role: Changed object link status and removed invalid object entries.
Updated data/sdata2/sbss symbols, including converting several lbl_* or named globals into local @NNN-style symbols and correcting object sizes.
Fixed WStar spawned logic to call it_80294624 instead of it_80294364 and reordered includes.

what_changed: configure.py promoted melee/pl/plattack.c from NonMatching to Matching.
configure.py promoted melee/pl/plbonus.c from NonMatching to Matching.
configure.py promoted melee/ft/ftchangeparam.c from NonMatching to Matching.
configure.py removed invalid NonMatching entry melee/ft/ft_3C61.c.
configure.py removed invalid NonMatching entry melee/ft/chara/ftPp_SpecialS.c.
config/GALE01/symbols.txt replaced several address-based lbl_* entries around .data:0x803BCF20 and .data:0x803C6F78 with local @NNN symbols and local label aliases where needed.
config/GALE01/symbols.txt split the prior lbl_803C6F98 size 0x58 object into @642 size 0x28 and @643 size 0x2D.
config/GALE01/symbols.txt renamed lbl_804D6480 to unk_804D6480 and changed its declared size from 0x8 to 0x2.
config/GALE01/symbols.txt converted several sdata2 constants at 0x804D7F20-0x804D7F50 and ftCo_804D8F60/ftCo_804D8F64 to local @NNN symbols.
src/melee/it/items/itwstar.c changed itWStar_Logic29_Spawned to call it_80294624(gobj) instead of it_80294364(gobj).
smart_moves: The PR combined configure.py link-status changes with the required symbol map cleanup, avoiding a state where newly linked files would collide with stale global lbl_* or incorrectly sized data symbols.
Removing invalid object entries from configure.py reduced the risk of building/linking nonexistent or incorrectly located source paths.

Converting unnamed data/constants to local @NNN symbols preserved compiler-style local symbol behavior instead of over-promoting internal strings, jump tables, floats, and doubles to global-looking labels.
The wrong-call fix in itwstar.c was isolated and direct: it only changed the callee in itWStar_Logic29_Spawned while leaving the surrounding item state initialization intact.
decomp_lessons: When flipping files from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py, audit the corresponding symbol-map ranges; linked files often require local data labels, jump tables, and sdata2 constants to be renamed or resized.
Do not keep invalid configure.py object entries around as placeholders if their paths are wrong or duplicate unrelated files; they can block clean linking work.
Small symbol-size corrections matter for matching: the PR changed lbl_804D6480 from an 0x8 object to a 0x2 unk_804D6480 object and split a 0x58 data object into two smaller local string objects.
For item logic fixes, verify the target helper by address/name rather than relying on nearby-looking function names; this PR corrected it_80294364 to it_80294624 in WStar spawned logic.
naming_conventions: Local compiler-generated objects in symbols.txt use @NNN names with scope:local, including strings, jump tables, floats, and doubles.
Local label aliases may use ...data.0 at the same address as a local object when required by the linked output.
Unidentified small data with uncertain semantics may use unk_ADDR rather than lbl_ADDR when a more precise global name is not justified.
Project source object paths in configure.py use subsystem paths such as melee/pl/plattack.c, melee/pl/plbonus.c, and melee/ft/ftchangeparam.c with Object(Matching, ...).
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Promote only verified files from Object(NonMatching, ...) to Object(Matching, ...) and remove invalid object lines instead of leaving them as nonmatching stubs.
For linked data, adjust symbol scope to local where the compiler emitted local constants or jump tables; stale global lbl_* symbols can prevent a clean link.
Use symbol splitting when a previous broad data object actually corresponds to multiple compiler-emitted local objects.
Confirm linked progress with decomp.dev metrics; here the bot reported +0.76% linked code and two new matches.

review_feedback.feedback: GALE01 report showed linked code 43.54% (+0.76%, +29480 bytes), matched data 41.45% (+0.01%, +128 bytes), linked data 35.11% (+0.05%, +592 bytes), with 2 new matches: main/melee/pl/plattack .sbss and main/melee/ft/ftchangeparam .data.
No human review comments or PR body explanation were present in the provided slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching configure.py entries for plattack, plbonus, or ftchangeparam after PR 2593.
Search for additional corrections to WStar item helper calls around it_80294364 and it_80294624.
Audit symbol-map changes where lbl_* objects were converted to @NNN local objects during file linking.
Check whether unk_804D6480 was later given a semantic name or refined type.
